projects.name: Demo: Career Transition Planning
projects.targetOutcome: By the end of this project, you have a clear transition plan, measurable weekly progress, and reusable artifacts for applications and interviews.

plan.title: Set direction
plan.objective: Define target role families and scope the first month.
plan.whyThisWeek: Clear direction prevents scattered effort and improves decision quality.
plan.developmentOutcome: You can explain where you are aiming and why.

tasks.title: Define 3 target role families
tasks.why: Role focus guides what skills and artifacts matter most.

tasks.title: Write selection criteria for opportunities
tasks.why: Criteria reduce noise and improve consistency.

plan.title: Create evidence
plan.objective: Build one concrete artifact tied to target roles.
plan.whyThisWeek: Evidence-based progress is more credible than activity-only progress.
plan.developmentOutcome: You can show concrete output, not just plans.

tasks.title: Build one portfolio artifact
tasks.why: Artifacts convert learning into visible value.

tasks.title: Run quality review and revise
tasks.outcome: A stronger artifact ready for sharing.

plan.title: Refine execution
plan.objective: Improve workflows for repeatable weekly delivery.
plan.whyThisWeek: Repeatable systems sustain progress better than one-off effort.
plan.developmentOutcome: Your process is easier to run each week.

tasks.title: Document weekly workflow checklist
tasks.why: Checklists improve consistency and reduce context switching.

plan.title: Review and reset
plan.objective: Review outcomes, identify gaps, and set the next cycle.
plan.whyThisWeek: Review closes the loop and prevents drift.
plan.developmentOutcome: You have an evidence-backed plan for the next month.

tasks.title: Write monthly progress summary
tasks.why: Summaries make growth visible and reusable.
tasks.outcome: A clear report of what improved and what did not.

roadmap.title: Direction and setup
roadmap.why: A clear target improves every downstream choice.
roadmap.outcome: You start with focus and alignment.

roadmap.title: Execution and evidence
roadmap.objective: Deliver artifacts and improve quality signals.
roadmap.why: Evidence and process quality drive practical outcomes.
roadmap.outcome: You build proof and improve reliability.

roadmap.title: Review and next cycle
roadmap.objective: Review results and set a stronger next cycle.
roadmap.outcome: You have an evidence-based next plan.

notes.1:
Write your 12-month target outcome in one paragraph
Why: Tasks make more sense when tied to an explicit target state.
Outcome: A clear north star for the whole system.

context.whyThisExists: This demo project shows how to structure a focused transition plan with weekly outcomes and reusable artifacts.
context.primaryGoal: Turn weekly effort into visible progress and portable evidence.
toolStrategy: Use AI for drafting and synthesis.
Use human review for decisions and quality gates.
Use templates to reduce repeated setup work.
guardrails: Do not treat fluent output as verified output.
Keep work bounded and test assumptions.
Prioritize maintainable progress over rapid churn.

projects.name: Demo: Agentic Engineering Sprint (4 Weeks)
projects.targetOutcome: By week 4, you can reliably run a plan-spec-implement-verify-review workflow with clear quality gates and measurable outcomes.

plan.title: Mental model upgrade
plan.objective: Understand where AI coding is strong and where it needs strict safeguards.
plan.whyThisWeek: Correct mental models reduce avoidable mistakes.
plan.developmentOutcome: You can explain conditional trust and verification requirements.

tasks.title: Write one-page trust model
tasks.why: A clear doctrine improves decisions under time pressure.

plan.title: Process installation
plan.objective: Install plan-spec-implement-verify-review as a weekly loop.
plan.developmentOutcome: You can run a repeatable execution loop.

tasks.title: Create spec and verification templates
tasks.why: Templates reduce setup cost and increase consistency.

plan.title: Real-task execution
plan.objective: Apply the loop on real implementation slices.
plan.whyThisWeek: Execution under real constraints validates the process.
plan.developmentOutcome: You can deliver with fewer regressions and clearer review trails.

plan.title: Consolidate and scale
plan.objective: Package the method and define next-cycle improvements.
plan.developmentOutcome: You have a playbook for ongoing use.

tasks.title: Write playbook and next-cycle plan
tasks.why: Captured process knowledge compounds over time.

roadmap.title: Scale
roadmap.why: Codification prevents regression to ad hoc work.

context.whyThisExists: This demo sprint teaches disciplined AI-assisted implementation and verification.
context.primaryGoal: Ship with quality while using AI effectively.
toolStrategy: Use one model for implementation and one for review.
Use tests and checklists as hard gates.
